THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CREDITOR'S TRADE ASSOCIATION, INC. DBA GREAT WESTERN COLLECTION BUREAU RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT JOHN CHOI AKA JEONG MO CHOI INDIVIDUALLY DBA FONTINA RISTORANTE DBA TOSCANA RISTORANTE $1,952.14 PRINCIPAL, $450.00 ATTORNEY FEES, $197.76 INTEREST, $355.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,954.90, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT

DISCOVERY 302, PLAINTIFF CREDITOR'S TRADE ASSOCIATION, INC'S MOTION TO COMPEL ANSWERS TO POST-JUDGMENT DISCOVERY AND FOR AWARD OF MONETARY SANCTIONS. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: NO OPPOSITION FILED. THE MOTION IS GRANTED. DEFENDANT JOHN CHOI, AKA JEONG MO CHOI, INDIVIDUALLY DBA FONTINA RISTORANTE, DBA TOSCANA RISTORANTE SHALL FURNISH RESPONSES TO PLAINTIFF'S POST JUDGMENT INTERROGATORIES AND PLAINTIFF'S POST JUDGMENT DEMAND FOR PRODUCTION OF DOCUMENTS AND TANGIBLE THINGS WITHIN FIFTEEN DAYS OF NOTICE OF THIS ORDER. FURTHER, THE DEFENDANT SHALL PAY MONETARY SANCTIONS IN THE AMOUNT OF $340 TO PLAINTIFF WITHIN FIFTEEN DAYS OF NOTICE OF THIS ORDER. PLAINTIFF TO SUBMIT A PROPOSED FORM OF ORDER. JUDGE PRO TEM: MARK SCHREIBER; NOT REPORTED

calendar.matters:
Ntc Of Mtn To Compel Answers To Post-Judgment Discovery And For Award Of Monetary Sanctions; Memo Of P & A; Dec And Pos
Off Calendar Aug-17-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: PLAINTIFF CREDITOR'S TRADE ASSOCIATION, INC'S MOTION TO COMPEL ANSWERS TO POST-JUDGMENT DISCOVERY AND FOR AWARD OF MONETARY SANCTIONS.
There being no appearances, the parties are deemed to have stipulated to the matter being decided by a Judge Pro Tem. The court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: No opposition filed. The motion is granted. Defendant JOHN CHOI, AKA JEONG MO CHOI, INDIVIDUALLY DBA FONTINA RISTORANTE, DBA TOSCANA RISTORANTE shall furnish responses to Plaintiff's Post Judgment Interrogatories and Plaintiff's Post Judgment Demand for Production of Documents and Tangible Things within fifteen days of notice of this order. Further, the defendant shall pay monetary sanctions in the amount of $340 to plaintiff within fifteen days of notice of this order. Plaintiff to submit a proposed form of order. (302/JPT) Judge Pro Tem: Mark Schreiber; Not reported
